name: authentication
description: JWT-based login/register with invite codes, admin accounts, session tracking, DB-backed brute-force lockout, and verifyTokenLoose for ?t= query-token auth on asset routes

envVars.name: JWT_SECRET
envVars.description: Secret used for JWT signing — use at least 32 random characters

requiresContract.description: The project must export getDb() that returns a better-sqlite3 Database instance

postInstall: 2. Create src/lib/db.ts with getDb() if it doesn't exist (see README)
3. Run db schema: sqlite3 data/app.db < db/migrations/001_auth.sql
4. Promote first admin: UPDATE users SET is_admin = 1 WHERE username = 'X'
5. Create the first invite code manually or via the admin panel
